stemHtml: The use of a hot air wing anti-icing system…

options.a: does not affect aerodynamic performance of the wing and causes a reduction in maximum thrust.
options.b: reduces aerodynamic performance of the wing and causes a reduction in maximum thrust.
options.c: does not affect aerodynamic performance of the wing and causes no reduction in maximum thrust.
options.d: reduces aerodynamic performance of the wing and causes no reduction in maximum thrust.
